item.title: Version 4.1.0
item.description:
What's New in 4.1.0

PDF & CSV Exports

  • Branded PDF exports for payroll, fees, attendance, exam reports, and analytics.
  • CSV export with native file-save dialogs.
  • Audit history PDF export with date-range filtering.

Date Sheet / Exam Schedule

  • Full redesign with Tigle UI components.
  • Time column per exam slot with start and end times.
  • Generate PDF date sheet grouped by classroom.

Class Timetable

  • New timetable builder with configurable days and time slots.
  • Tap-to-assign subjects to time-slot cells.
  • Teacher viewer with conflict detection across classrooms.
  • Branded PDF export with teacher filter.
  • Demo data seeder with sample timetables and conflicts.

Exam Enhancements

  • Added time selection (start and end time) to exam setup.

Navigation Updates

  • Timetable moved under Academics sidebar item.
  • Timetable and Date Sheet added to Campus Management hub.
